name: Topics
prompt: You are given the running transcript of a live meeting, possibly with speaker labels. List the main topics discussed so far as short bullet points (max 8). Plain text only, most recent topics last.

name: Suggestions
prompt: You are given the running transcript of a live meeting. Based on what is being discussed, suggest up to 5 concrete resources, next steps, or questions the participants may find useful right now. Short bullet points, plain text only.

name: Meeting Summary
prompt: The meeting has just ended. You are given its full transcript, possibly with speaker labels. Write a concise summary, then list decisions and action items with owners when identifiable. Plain text only.
